_comment: The single-shop 'key': this config pins the app to ONE shop. Swap shopCode/environment/publishableKey per clone. apiBase = Core-direct (auth + not-yet-published routes); edgeApiBase + publishableKey = the public edge plane (W2) — the pk is publishable by design (it grants nothing without the customer's login) and pins the app to its shop SERVER-side. Omit edgeApiBase/publishableKey to run fully Core-direct (pre-W2 behavior).
